---
name: Playthrough feedback
about: You played a session — tell us what happened
title: '[playthrough] '
labels: playthrough-feedback
assignees: ''
---

> **Real-player feedback is the highest-leverage contribution to this
> repo right now.** We have ~0 verified human-test data points. Even
> a 5-minute write-up is more useful than a code patch.

## Setup

- Seed you used (or "the default featured one"):
- Role you picked:
- Difficulty: story / gauntlet
- Where you played: localhost / hosted demo / fork

## What happened

<!-- Free-form. What ending did you get? Did you finish, or quit early?
What was the most memorable moment? Did anything feel like a
designed-on-purpose moment vs. an LLM-fluke moment? -->

## What was confusing

<!-- Any UI element, mechanic, or narration moment that made you
pause and wonder "what just happened" or "what am I supposed to do".
Be specific — "the role banner" / "turn 6 narration" / "oracle
button". -->

## What was rewarding

<!-- What made you feel like you affected the story? Did you ever feel
like you were just along for the ride? -->

## Would you replay?

- [ ] Yes, with a different role on the same seed
- [ ] Yes, with a different seed
- [ ] No
- [ ] Already replayed

## Would you share with a friend?

- [ ] Yes, definitely
- [ ] Maybe, if it improves
- [ ] No

If yes — what would you say to make them try it?

## Anything else

<!-- Bugs, weird LLM outputs, ending labels you got, screenshots —
drop them here. -->
